ul.li: Simple types: Simple String, Bulk String, Integer, Array
Stream-oriented: partial reads must be handled correctly

ul.li: Store parser state in Client struct
Resume from exact state on next read
Check for complete frame after each state transition
Use remaining_bytes counter for bulk strings
Reset parser, disconnect client on fatal error
